'''''Star Wars Tales Volume 1''''' is the first trade paperback collection of the ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series. Volume 1 collects ''Star Wars Tales'' issues 1-4. It was released on [[February 20]], [[2002]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Collecting the first four issues of the quarterly anthology smash sensation, ''Star Wars Tales'' contains thrilling stories featuring Darth Vader, Obi-Wan Kenobi, Han Solo, Emperor Palpatine, C-3PO, R2-D2, Lando Calrissian and a cast of thousands! ''Tales'' explores every corner of the Star Wars galaxy and keeps readers coming back for more! ''Star Wars Tales'' Volume I is sure to delight fans both young and old!''

==Contents==
*''[[Star Wars Tales 1]]''
*''[[Star Wars Tales 2]]''
*''[[Star Wars Tales 3]]''
*''[[Star Wars Tales 4]]''
